name: octo-apm-trace-drilldown
description: Parameterised span query for one trace id. Pair with Log Analytics trace-drilldown for the matching log rows.
queryText: show (spans) TraceId, ServiceName as Service, OperationName as Operation, SpanDuration as Duration where TraceId = '${trace_id}'

parameters.name: trace_id
parameters.description: 32-character OCI APM/W3C trace id copied from APM, RUM, OCI Logging, or Log Analytics.
